summary: The Dow jumped at the open and held its gains for the entire session, closing up 875 points, or 1.7%. Artificial intelligence continues to whipsaw tech stocks, with huge up days followed by significant declines. Tech stocks are so valuable that they move the broader indexes no matter what’s happening elsewhere.
content: The Dow jumped at the open and held its gains for the entire session, closing up 875 points, or 1.7%. Artificial intelligence continues to whipsaw tech stocks, with huge up days followed by significant declines. Tech stocks are so valuable that they move the broader indexes no matter what’s happening elsewhere.
chineseSummary: 道琼斯指数开盘上涨，并全天守住涨幅，收盘上涨 875 点，涨幅 1.7%。人工智能继续冲击科技股，先是大幅上涨，随后又大幅下跌。科技股非常有价值，无论其他地方发生什么，它们都会影响更广泛的指数。
chineseContent: 道琼斯指数开盘上涨，并全天守住涨幅，收盘上涨 875 点，涨幅 1.7%。人工智能继续冲击科技股，先是大幅上涨，随后又大幅下跌。科技股非常有价值，无论其他地方发生什么，它们都会影响更广泛的指数。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
